title: HTTPLogItem
description: A single log entry to submit to Datadog

message.description: The message content of the log entry. This field is required and indexed for search.

hostname.description: The name of the host that generated the log entry

service.description: The name of the application or service that generated the log

ddsource.description: The source technology of the log (e.g., nginx, redis, java) used for automatic processing

ddtags.description: Comma-separated list of tags to apply to the log entry in key:value format

status.description: The severity or log level of the event (e.g., info, warning, error, critical)
